inputs.label: Impact Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional load factor from sudden movements (usually 1.1-1.3)

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional load factor from sudden movements (typically 1.1-1.3)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ani hareketlerden kaynaklanan ek yük faktörü (genellikle 1.1-1.3)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de charge supplémentaire dû aux mouvements brusques (généralement 1.1-1.3)
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de carga adicional por movimientos bruscos (generalmente 1.1-1.3)

inputs.label: Load Distribution Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor to account for asymmetric load distribution (1.0 symmetric distribution)

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor to account for asymmetric load distribution (1.0 symmetric distribution)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Asimetrik yük dağılımını hesaba katmak için faktör (1.0 simetrik dağılım)
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor zur Berücksichtigung asymmetrischer Lastverteilung (1,0 bei symmetrischer Verteilung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur pour tenir compte d'une répartition asymétrique de la charge (1.0 pour répartition symétrique)
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor para tener en cuenta la distribución asimétrica de la carga (1.0 distribución simétrica)
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل لمراعاة التوزيع غير المتماثل للحمولة (1.0 للتوزيع المتماثل)
